texto: Dad reckons if you have a great time in one place, then that's a good reason for never going back. Nothing will ever measure up to the first time. He laughs at people who go to the same place every year, same beach, same house, same things to do.
explicacao: Citação de James Moloney sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Dad reckons if you have a great time in one place, then that's a good reason for never going back…” articula reflexao, travel, place em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.
